mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.CUST_NO AS customerNo, c.CUST_NM AS customerNm, c.BUSINESS_NO AS businessNo, cm.CUST_USERNM AS managerName, MAX(i.INSPECTION_DATE)::timestamp AS lastInspectionDate, COALESCE(SUM(l.LICENSE_COUNT), 0) AS totalLicenseCount, ( SELECT i2.RESULT_STATUS FROM INSPECTION i2 WHERE i2.CUST_NO = c.CUST_NO ORDER BY i2.INSPECTION_DATE DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS resultStatus FROM CUSTOMER c LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER_MANAGER cm ON cm.CUST_NO = c.CUST_NO LEFT JOIN LICENSE l ON l.CUST_NO = c.CUST_NO LEFT JOIN INSPECTION i ON i.CUST_NO = c.CUST_NO GROUP BY c.CUST_NO, c.CUST_NM, c.BUSINESS_NO, cm.CUST_USERNM ) t ORDER BY t.customerNo DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT c.CUST_NO FROM CUSTOMER c LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER_MANAGER cm ON cm.CUST_NO = c.CUST_NO LEFT JOIN LICENSE l ON l.CUST_NO = c.CUST_NO LEFT JOIN INSPECTION i ON i.CUST_NO = c.CUST_NO GROUP BY c.CUST_NO, c.CUST_NM, c.BUSINESS_NO, cm.CUST_USERNM ) t

SELECT COUNT( CASE WHEN INSPECTION_STATUS = 'SCHEDULED' AND DATE_TRUNC('month', INSPECTION_DATE) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 END) AS scheduledInspectionCount,
COUNT( CASE WHEN INSPECTION_STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE_TRUNC('month', INSPECTION_DATE) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 END) AS completedInspectionCount,
COUNT( CASE WHEN NEXT_INSPECTION_DATE < CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 END) AS expiringLicenseCount,
COUNT(*) AS totalInspectionCount
FROM INSPECTION;

SELECT i.INSPECTION_NO AS inspectionNo, c.CUST_NO AS customerNo, c.CUST_NM AS customerNm, cm.CUST_USERNM AS customerManagerNM, cm.CUST_TEL AS customerTel, cm.CUST_EM AS customerEm, i.INSPECTOR_NAME AS inspectorName, i.RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, i.NEXT_INSPECTION_DATE AS nextInspectionDate, l.EXPIRE_DATE AS expiredInspectionDate FROM CUSTOMER c LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER_MANAGER cm ON c.CUST_NO = CM.CUST_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (CUST_NO) * FROM INSPECTION i ORDER BY CUST_NO, INSPECTION_DATE DESC ) i ON C.CUST_NO = i.CUST_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (CUST_NO) * FROM LICENSE l ORDER BY CUST_NO, EXPIRE_DATE DESC ) l ON C.CUST_NO = l.CUST_NO
ORDER BY C.CUST_NO DESC

SELECT i.INSPECTION_NO AS inspectionNo, c.CUST_NO AS customerNo, c.CUST_NM AS customerNm, cm.CUST_USERNM AS customerManagerNM, cm.CUST_TEL AS customerTel, cm.CUST_EM AS customerEm, i.INSPECTOR_NAME AS inspectorName, i.RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, i.NEXT_INSPECTION_DATE AS nextInspectionDate, l.EXPIRE_DATE AS expiredInspectionDate FROM CUSTOMER c LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER_MANAGER cm ON c.CUST_NO = CM.CUST_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (CUST_NO) * FROM INSPECTION i ORDER BY CUST_NO, INSPECTION_DATE DESC ) i ON C.CUST_NO = i.CUST_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (CUST_NO) * FROM LICENSE l ORDER BY CUST_NO, EXPIRE_DATE DESC ) l ON C.CUST_NO = l.CUST_NO
ORDER BY C.CUST_NO DESC

SELECT c.cust_no AS customerNo, c.cust_nm AS customerNm, c.business_no AS businessNo,
-- 고객 담당자 (여러명일 경우 1명만) cm.cust_usernm AS managerName, cm.cust_tel AS managerPhone,
-- 최근 점검일 ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(i.inspection_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM inspection i WHERE i.cust_no = c.cust_no ) AS lastInspectionDate,
-- 라이선스 총 수량 ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.license_count), 0) FROM license l WHERE l.cust_no = c.cust_no ) AS totalLicenseCount,
-- 만료일 (ACTIVE만 기준) ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(l.expire_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM license l WHERE l.cust_no = c.cust_no AND l.status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS expiryDate,
-- 최근 점검 메모 ( SELECT i.memo FROM inspection i WHERE i.cust_no = c.cust_no ORDER BY i.inspection_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS memo
FROM customer c LEFT JOIN customer_manager cm ON cm.cust_no = c.cust_no WHERE c.cust_no = #{custNo} LIMIT 1;
